creator: mike@fth-devel.net
text:
Hi, Michael!  Sorry for my incomplete PR.  Here are the diffs for Makefile 
and distinfo.  I checked with

     port test /usr/ports/devel/libtecla

as well as with

     portlint -abc

The only warning with both of them are:

WARN: Makefile: only one MASTER_SITE configured.  Consider adding 
additional mirrors.

I hope this is a bit more precise and correct.

Regards,
Mike
